args.query: SELECT time, rating, gmap_id, text FROM review LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql: SELECT time, rating, gmap_id, text FROM review LIMIT 50;

args.query: SELECT gmap_id, COUNT(*) AS high_reviews FROM review WHERE CAST(rating AS FLOAT) >= 4.5 AND time LIKE '%2019%' GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY high_reviews DESC LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, COUNT(*) AS high_reviews FROM review WHERE CAST(rating AS FLOAT) >= 4.5 AND time LIKE '%2019%' GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY high_reviews DESC LIMIT 10;
